heroHeadline: Iran Signals Selective Hormuz Opening; Trump Issues 48-Hour Deadline as War Rages
heroSubtitle: Iran allows non-hostile vessels through Strait under coordination; Trump postpones energy infrastructure strikes 5 days; IDF strikes Tehran cruise missile sites; Lebanon toll passes 1,094+; Hengaw reports 6,530+ killed in Iran; 82nd Airborne deploys to CENTCOM AOR
